title: tannodia tenuifolia
intro: Tannodia tenuifolia, also known as the Madagascar ironwood, is a species of plant in the family Sapindaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tannodia tenuifolia include reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve infusion or decoction, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
